{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324102037D031615615160FAF9DB4"}"},"total":869},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610623583393497880","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"事业型大女主，把遇到困难，处理困难的细节写了很多。终于不是抛出问题、给出答案，具体内容考脑补了。女主家人刻画的很好，不是单一的善良或者恶毒。比如她爸一直把她就是当商品，但是女儿当干部替他挣了脸面，弥补了了他的官瘾，当然她妈也一样，女主就经常给他们带一些别人看得见的稍微贵价的物品，他们满意，女主得到了口碑，这些对于她以后的仕途都是有利的","text_exts":[{"e":6,"s":3,"text":"大女主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317743188370FAF9DB4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227610623583393497880%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227570748689354869784%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771989570,"group_id":"7570748689354869784","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9qMxUA4f29yH4SeA5H6MT6KYSXUBzD7DaSeWZND7muB","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1731061001509652","user_name":"雨蒙蒙、胧胧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1731061001509652","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774447048,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":24,"name":"气氛达人","small_url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/b7c8672db629fbb3d8f83a83721675dc~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/d2c24adfe48394cad03d7b1d29d70622~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7570748689354869784","book_info":{"abstract":"（年代+穿书+空间）
标签：清醒大女主，一门心思搞事业
杨丽华胎穿十几年，在大哥杨立新相亲这天，突然觉醒了，自己的未来大嫂是一本年代文中里被小姑子刁难的苦命女主，而她就是那个让读者恨得牙痒痒的极品小姑子。
脑子里还不定时的出现各种剧情，
无论她在哪本书里，她都是主角的炮灰垫脚石，
更是为主角送上各种金手指的大傻子。
拿了她的金手指，还一个个的都想把她送下乡，一辈子困在乡下。
那她就先抢了主角的金手指，比主角更加成功，一辈子都压在他们头上。
看杨丽华如何从一名车间挡车女工一步步走向厂办，进宣传科，从主管国营大厂到主政一方。
排雷：女主比较自私，首先只考虑自己的得失，感情戏很少。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/85554971009edb0ce63a2f21d93b76ca","author":"婷娃娃","author_id":"","book_id":"7570748689354869784","book_name":"七零车间女工：觉醒抢光金手指","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"14.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":79,"name":"年代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=79&name=年代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":862,"name":"家长里短","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=862&name=家长里短&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7571094654158914072","read_count":"145540","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"479608"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"228","tags":"年代,现代言情,空间,穿书,虐渣,家长里短","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7b2d565ee2e3cf53144e555e04d34dc2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779502837&x-signature=6G7Q2BTeR8Jfd5BD9JjDbO2YyB0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1108757804225086","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"197"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324102037D031615615160FAF9DB4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":46,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":16935,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":31204,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":14913},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610285846584623897","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好看。开始被书名误导了，好几次看到都没点开。这次书荒打开，才发现差点错过一本好书。这是少有的靠智商+情商在年代里成长的女主。金手指？那是什么？虽然有，但几乎没啥用。不是那种泛滥成灾的靠空间养殖倒卖的恶俗年代文。是真的靠现代人的先进和开阔眼界走自己的上升之路。很好。
缺点就是太短，不够看。作者快点写。大家可以多催更。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771910815,"group_id":"7570748689354869784","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N28J1Gk2AKLz0erwumfsKMJirR1FNqH0kfkIuFZyGASd","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1067006921814832","user_name":"用户名96615698"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1067006921814832","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7570748689354869784","book_info":{"abstract":"（年代+穿书+空间）

女主是真的大女人，大智谋，玩政治一把好手。剧情节奏一点都不拖沓合情合理，一年的时间直接从车间女工飞跃宣传科副科长，谁敢想，谁敢想，真的很爽[笑][笑][笑]。爽哉，爽哉～"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771393844,"group_id":"7570748689354869784","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"争取成为一只努力生活的咸鱼","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0YxYQqrGyDj4VfaoiNwkAH9yxAi5ndUuUV+/cTEyq8u","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/09fed6e93d414327a8072a127967c0c4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877526&x-signature=Ib%2BshvsazUoi4p%2BQEJJNO%2BsN3LU%3D","user_id":"2447960073582543","user_name":"买一个橘子的橘子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2447960073582543","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7570748689354869784","book_info":{"abstract":"（年代+穿书+空间）
